changelog: __**SERIUM v1.6 — Changelog**__ > Released: 18/03/2026 · by Serium Studios  **✅ Added** * Hardware Monitor module (V2) — live CPU, GPU, RAM, network, drive stats updating every 2s * CPU per-core usage display with individual bars * GPU usage, VRAM, temperature and fan speed monitoring * RAM usage bar with live percentage * Network upload/download speed tracking * Drive health bars per drive * Overall system health score out of 100 * Hardware Monitor pause/resume button * Diagnostics panel — CPU load, RAM pressure, temp files, uptime health checks * Clear Temp Files button in Diagnostics * Add/remove custom apps in App Launcher * Delete icon on hover for all app cards * SERIUM watermark in bottom right corner * Sidebar version label — SERIUM v1.6 by Serium Studios * In-app command output for system and network tools  **🔧 Fixed** * App launcher cards not rendering on launch * Serial key activate button not responding (CSP blocking scripts) * Window closing instead of transitioning after key activation * System Tools disk info failing on Windows 11 (replaced wmic with PowerShell) * Live Diagnostics CPU and startup count failing on Windows 11 (replaced wmic) * get-session IPC handler missing — broke session restore, disk info and hardware stats * All IPC handlers failing after broken handler in chain  **♻️ Changed** * Version bumped to 1.6 * Author updated to Serium Studios * Removed Live Diagnostics sect
